chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5641 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "إِنَّ اَلْجَدَّ شَرِيكُ اَلْإِخْوَةِ وَ حَظُّهُ مِثْلُ حَظِّ أَحَدِهِمْ مَا بَلَغُوا كَثُرُوا أَوْ قَلُّوا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5641 - Hammad narrated from Hariz from Al-Fuḍayl or someone else from Abu Abdullah (as) who said: "The grandfather shares the inheritance with the siblings, and his share is equal to the share of one of them, regardless of whether they are many or few."
